current.status: TESTED 2026-W27. LTHR 160 (30-min TT 2026-07-04). FTP cycling 196 (ramp 2026-06-30, intervals.icu eFTP model, athlete-confirmed). RHR 36 (Garmin overnight avg). LTHR shift -3 bpm (<5) => HR zones unchanged. Running FTP 280 NOT retested (Stryd); 2026-07-04 TT streams show 20-min running power ~328 W => likely stale low.

next_lthr_run.protocol: 30-min all-out TT on flat route. LTHR = avg HR of last 20 min of the TT lap (exclude warmup + cooldown). See docs/THRESHOLD_TESTS.md

next_ftp_cycling.protocol: Ramp test, ERG ON. 1-min steps +10% FTP/min (60%->170%) to failure. LOG the intervals.icu ramp eFTP value (its own model, ~0.70 x best 1-min) for trend consistency; cross-check with analyze_activity.py best-1-min. See docs/THRESHOLD_TESTS.md

retest_schedule.frequency: Every 8 weeks during Base/Build phases; every 6 weeks in Specific phase

history.method: 30-min all-out TT; LTHR = avg HR last 20 min of TT lap (1800 s block, laps 12-18). Weighted 160.2. Set 5K PR, feel 1.
history.note: vs 2025-05-30: LTHR 163->160 AND pace 4:29->4:17/km => faster at lower HR = aerobic fitness gain, not decline. Wed->Thu alcohol 3 days prior: HRV dipped 39 Thu, rebounded 82 Fri, test-day HRV 55 - clean performance.

history.method: Ramp ERG. intervals.icu eFTP = 196 (adopted). analyze_activity.py: best 1-min 279 W -> 0.75x = 209 W. Athlete confirmed 196 by feel + as trend baseline.
history.note: Down from stale 215 (never tested). Future ramps log intervals.icu eFTP for consistency.

history.method: 30-min TT (recovered from .fit 2026-07-04). LTHR = avg HR last 20 min of 30-min TT lap = 163. Confirms the previously-'unknown' 163 profile value came from this test.
history.note: TT 6679 m in 30 min, avg HR 159, max 166. Baseline for 2026-07-04 comparison.

zones_derived_from.hr_zones: LTHR-based, see intervals.icu/CLAUDE.md. LTHR 163->160 is -3 bpm (<5 threshold) so zone tables kept as-is.
zones_derived_from.power_zones_bike: %FTP-based, FTP 196 W; ERG targets auto-scale from FTP in push_plan.
zones_derived_from.warning: If LTHR retest shifts >5 bpm - zones must be regenerated and CLAUDE.md updated
